title: AOS Remote Agent (A2A peer)
description: Declares an agent served remotely over the Agent2Agent (A2A) protocol — a cross-boundary AGENT, not a tool. Referenced by an aos/agent/v1 member via its remote_ref. 'A2A on the outside': boundary-crossing agent traffic, never tool/data (that stays MCP). An ADK 2.0 agent exposed via to_a2a() is reached as just another A2A peer.

agent_card_url.description: Base or full URL of the peer's Agent Card (/.well-known/agent-card.json). Validated by MeshEgressPolicy before any request.

transport.description: A2A transport. Only jsonrpc is implemented for egress in Phase 3.

auth_ref.description: Name of an environment variable holding the bearer credential. NEVER the secret itself.

cost.description: unmetered (default): remote spend is reported as 0 and flagged, so it never silently corrupts budget gating. metered: trust a self-reported cost contract (opt-in).

capabilities.description: Optional capability/skill tags, advisory for routing/discovery.
